title: terminalis stricta
intro: Terminalis stricta, also known as Terminalia stricta, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the Combretaceae family. The bark of Terminalia stricta has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The tree is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Terminalia stricta include decoctions, infusions, and powder forms, which can be used to create teas, tonics, and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
